failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T > 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure
Implement regular maintenance and cleaning schedule

failure_modes.cause: Failure to provide sufficient cooling upon reaction completion
failure_modes.mitigation: Automate quenching process with temperature monitoring

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run blank solvent at Q=0.378 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
Simulate blockage in BPR valve and assess flow rate impact
Test quenching efficiency by measuring temperature drop over time post-reaction
